title: News Releases | National Institutes of Health (NIH)
body: News Releases Researchers develop innovative model for risk assessment for hypertrophic cardiomyopathy May 11, 2026 — NIH-funded study incorporates new measures to better predict outcomes in chronic heart condition. NIH-funded study suggests that testosterone suppresses brain tumor growth in males May 6, 2026 — Findings may warrant exploration of the hormones as glioblastoma treatment. Oral small-molecule GLP-1 drugs penetrate deep into the brain to suppress cravings May 6, 2026 — NIH-funded research identifies new mechanism of action for next-generation weight-loss drugs. Adding weekly GLP-1 to cognitive behavioral therapy further reduces heavy drinking April 30, 2026 — Clinical trial suggests semaglutide may help patients with alcohol use disorder and obesity. Symptom-based approach treats opioid withdrawal in newborns with minimal drug exposure April 27, 2026 — NIH-funded clinical trial shows that the new approach could also decrease time in the hospital. Clinical trial finds no difference in fluid treatment options for pediatric sepsis April 24, 2026 — NIH-supported study is largest ever to compare fluid interventions to prevent major kidney damage in children treated for septic shock. NIH-funded AI model predicts cancer survival from single-cell tumor data April 21, 2026 — Study links specific cell populations to patient risk in melanoma and liver cancer. Dr. Jonathan M. Green selected as CEO of the NIH Clinical Center April 21, 2026 — The NIH Clinical Center is the largest research hospital in the world. NIH-funded breakthrough shrinks CRISPR for precision delivery in the body April 13, 2026 — Smaller gene-editing system could expand treatment options for cancer, ALS and other diseases. Low-cost care model reduces blood pressure in high-risk populations April 8, 2026 — NIH-supported clinical trial shows coordinated care strategy more effective than standard care For the Press Media Contacts NIH-Funded Research (EurekAlert.org) Pick-up Research Articles ( NIH Research Matters ) Pick-up Health Articles ( NIH News in Health ) More sources for NIH news and events Connect with Us Subscribe to news releases RSS Feed This page last reviewed on March 10, 2025
